lines: Hadar stands between the tap handle and the crowd, shoulders square without touching his weapon.
"Keep one line against the board. If either breaks, the strongest household drinks first."

choices.label: Ask why he denied Tabitha’s fourth cup
Ask who gave the Chain authority here

lines: "I denied an unlisted draw. Susanna can amend the list and I will fill it."
"If I make private corrections, every guard becomes a second steward with worse handwriting."

choices.label: Ask who gave the Chain authority here

lines: "The council hired guards after two tank fights. Darius pays us now because the council cannot."
"That answer is not as clean as a uniform makes it look."
